+### Survival Calculation
+- If customer pays at day 287: cash = 2699 - 595 + 3 = 2107
+- Then survives: 2107 / 85 = 24.8 more days
+- Final day: ~312
+- If customer churns before day 287: survive until day ~312 (same, since $3 barely extends)
+- So either way, final day approximately 312
